_comment: Community playlist config. EDIT EVERY OTHER MONDAY (new two-week round): change theme.title/theme.sub. Theme ideas: Local artists · Songs for a Lake Champlain sunset · Rainy day records · Songs that sound like the Old North End · First-snow songs · Church Street busker energy. seeds only show until the Supabase tables exist (db/quick-wins.sql) — after that the live list takes over and past rounds' winners stay on the wall.

theme.title: Local artists
theme.sub: Kick off week one with Vermont-made music — from Phish to whoever played your favorite basement show.

seeds.why: Burlington's most famous export, doing the thing live.
Waitsfield's own, for the drive home along the lake.
"I would leave if only I could find a reason" — the most Vermont lyric ever written, by a Strafford kid.
Burlington punk royalty — the sons of Death keeping it loud.
The voice of a hundred Burlington summer nights.
